name: seedspec
description: Authoring tools, package protocol, runtime, and CLI for portable agent-ready seeds

scripts.release:pack: npm pack --workspace @seedspec/protocol --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @seedspec/runtime --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @seedspec/cli --dry-run
scripts.validate:fixtures: node ./packages/cli/bin/seedspec.js validate ./conformance/fixtures/comprehensive-application && node ./packages/cli/bin/seedspec.js validate ./conformance/fixtures/portable-feature && node ./packages/cli/bin/seedspec.js validate ./conformance/fixtures/revision-feature && node ./packages/cli/bin/seedspec.js validate ./conformance/fixtures/profiled-workflow
scripts.check: npm run release:verify && npm run check:names && npm test && npm run test --workspace @seedspec/cli && npm run validate:fixtures
